message:
fix(float): Add underscore validation and eval literal fast path

- Add underscore validation in lexer (tokenizer/numbers.zig) to reject
  invalid Python underscore literals (_0, 0_, 0__0, 0.1__4)
- Add underscore validation in runtime expr_parser.zig for dynamic eval
- Add literal fast path in eval_cache.zig to parse simple literals
  (ints, floats, bools, None, strings) without bytecode compilation
- Add parseFloatBytes for ASCII-only bytes parsing (bytes shouldn't
  use Unicode digit conversion)
- Fix parseFloatWithUnicode to reject non-digit Unicode characters
- Update str_conv.zig to use pyRepr for proper repr formatting
- Update comparison.zig and lifecycle.zig for Zig 0.15 compatibility

The literal fast path prevents eval() from spawning subprocess for
simple expressions like eval("1_000.0") which could cause infinite
recursion if the subprocess also calls eval().
